assumptions.data_source: local deterministic generator; no external data fetch
assumptions.execution_timing: signals known after close; trades on rebalance dates using lagged signals; holdings affect next price row
assumptions.feature_timing: 12-1 momentum uses shifted historical price anchors; signal lag keeps portfolio formation after signal availability
assumptions.slippage_model: not separately modeled; diagnostic synthetic run only
assumptions.transaction_cost_model: 10.00 bps per unit of target-weight turnover

caveats: no live trading or brokerage integration
not evidence of real-world strategy performance
next_action: Use as a reproducible smoke-test log only; real-data experiments still require explicit data-source, universe, slippage, benchmark, and validation-split documentation.
summary: Deterministic synthetic 12-1 momentum workflow that generates local synthetic prices, computes a lagged momentum signal, and runs the existing long-only backtester as a smoke test.
title: Synthetic Momentum Demo
